title: DougDoug MugMug ModMod
description:
Adds the DougDoug MugMugs (MugMug, CowCow, MelonMelon, and BrickBrick) to Minecraft as rideable entities. Credit to Cameron7108 for making all of the MugMug models except for the brick.

Also adds MugMug and BrickBrick trophy blocks.
body:
# Read This For a Quick Rundown of the Mod

Hello, MugCraft MugCraft

The MugMugs can be bred using a clay ball. This is their food and is used for all of the MugMug variants. Each MugMug variant requires their own unique items to tame and saddle them. these items are as follows:

## **Taming:**

MugMug - Suspicious Stew

MelonMelon - Melon Slice

CowCow - Milk Bucket

BrickBrick - Brick

## **Saddling:**

MugMug - Bowl

MelonMelon - Melon

CowCow - Oak Log

BrickBrick - Cracked Stone Bricks



The MugMug and MelonMelon can store 1 bucket of water to be retrieved later with an empty bucket

The CowCow is similar, but uses milk instead

THE BRICK HAS NO MUG HOLE, IT CANNOT STORE LIQUIDS


The MugMugs also have craftable trophy blocks. The crafting recipes for each are as follows:


MugMug - 9 bowls (b = bowl)

b   b   b

b   b   b

b   b   b

MelonMelon - 8 melon blocks, 1 bowl (b = bowl, m = melon block)

m   m   m

m   b   m

m   m   m

CowCow - 8 raw beef, 1 bowl (b = bowl, r = raw beef)

r   r   r

r   b   r

r   r   r

BrickBrick - 8 bricks, 1 bowl (b = bowl, G = brick)

G   G   G

G   b   G

G   G   G

Notes:

The mod now works on NeoForge using Sinytra Connector

owo-lib is required for this mod to function


Please report any issues with the mod on the GitHub issues page, and enjoy the mod!

P.S.

CHECK OUT [The DougDoug MugMug ModMod Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3rBOEx7wGOk) FROM CAMERON7108!!!!!!
